benefits.description: Maintained fertility while on TRT; doubled HCG dose during a week-long trip and successfully conceived a second child

protocol_notes: Started with HCG monotherapy via telehealth, then transitioned to TRT while continuing HCG. Doubled HCG dose for one week when unable to refrigerate. Reports HCG alone was insufficient for his goals (presumably TRT goals). Also anecdotally shared that a friend achieved pregnancy after two large HCG doses in one week.
